8dfce0386cfa.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
8dfce0386cfa.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
8dfce0386cfa.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

0e354b5a1021.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
0e354b5a1021.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
0e354b5a1021.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

704e3665bdf9.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
704e3665bdf9.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

3d916e7e5f81.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
3d916e7e5f81.description: At 83 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
